ddls:
CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "community_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community area */,
  "bounding_box" TEXT /* Geographic bounding box of the community area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the community area */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the community area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic indicator */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the socioeconomic indicator (e.g., PERCENT OF HOUSING CROWDED) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the socioeconomic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was measured */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the indicator belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the indicator (e.g., percentage, ratio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_indicators_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES indicator_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_indicators_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_indicators_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_indicators_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES indicator_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Housing, Poverty) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Percentage, Ratio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was measured */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the socioeconomic indicator being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_area_indicators" (
  "community_area_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area indicator */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the socioeconomic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the socioeconomic indicator for the community area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was measured */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_area_indicators_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_area_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the socioeconomic indicator */,
  "related_indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related socioeconomic indicator */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., correlated, causally related) */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_relationships_related_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_relationships_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_boundaries" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community area the boundary belongs to */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of boundary (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "boundary_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_boundaries_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the socioeconomic indicator */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the indicator is updated */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_metadata_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_metadata_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
